name: Tangy Mashed Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in boiling water until just cooked through.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together the yogurt, mayonnaise, dill, vinegar, pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
3. Pour the dressing over the potatoes and toss thoroughly.
- The salad can be prepared to this point up to 24 hours ahead of time.
- Cover and refrigerate, but return it to room temperature before serving.
4. Stir in the diced red onions.
5. Adjust the seasoning with additional salt or pepper if desired before serving.
